---
title: "`r params$title`"
params:
  rds_path: NULL
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(dplyr)
library(reactable)
library(htmltools)
library(readr)

test_list <- read_rds(params$rds_path)

tagList(
  lapply(test_list, function(x) {

    test_class <- x$test_class[1]

    # Overview row
    x_overview <- x |>
      summarise(
        fn_name = "OVERVIEW",
        coverage = round(mean(as.numeric(file_coverage), na.rm = TRUE), 2),
        test_url = "",
        tests = sum(as.numeric(tests), na.rm = TRUE),
        skipped = sum(as.numeric(skipped), na.rm = TRUE),
        failures = sum(as.numeric(failures), na.rm = TRUE),
        errors = sum(as.numeric(errors), na.rm = TRUE),
        time = sum(as.numeric(time), na.rm = TRUE)
      )

    x_tbl <- x |>
      rename(coverage = file_coverage) |>
      mutate(
        coverage = as.numeric(coverage),
        tests = as.numeric(tests),
        skipped = as.numeric(skipped),
        failures = as.numeric(failures),
        errors = as.numeric(errors),
        time = round(as.numeric(time), 4),
        fn_name = ifelse(
          is.na(script_url),
          fn_name,
          sprintf('<a href="%s" target="_blank">%s</a>', script_url, fn_name)
        ),
        test_url = ifelse(
          is.na(test_url),
          "",
          sprintf('<a href="%s" target="_blank">View</a>', test_url)
        )
      ) |>
      select(-script_url, -test_class, -fn_name_sub) |>
      bind_rows(x_overview) |>
      rename(
        Function = fn_name,
        Coverage = coverage,
        Test = test_url
      )

    tagList(
      tags$h3(sprintf("Test type: %s", test_class)),
      reactable(
        x_tbl,
        searchable = TRUE,
        sortable = TRUE,
        highlight = TRUE,
        compact = TRUE,
        bordered = TRUE,
        striped = TRUE,
        columns = list(
          Function = colDef(html = TRUE),
          Test = colDef(html = TRUE)
        )
      )
    )
  })
)
```
